# ADR-012 Compliance — Enterprise Governance

**Governance phase:** 3.5 · **Authority document:** `docs/ADR-012-*.md` · **Date:** 2026-07-19
**Verifier:** `architecture/compliance/verify-architecture.mjs` · **Do not edit the ADR itself.**

## Purpose
Govern the enterprise architecture: make conformance measurable, traceable, auditable, and enforceable.

## Scope
Enterprise governance architecture — how the platform governs itself. This phase (3.5) realizes it.

## Current implementation status
**Proposed; Realized by this phase — 85% compliant.**

## Implemented components
- Executable verifier (8 rules) auto-discovering enterprise files, CI-gateable
- Traceability matrix (11 contexts × 14 ADRs, no undefined cell)
- 14 ADR compliance documents
- Rules registry (15 rules) + evidence map

## Remaining work
- Wire verifier into CI as a required check
- Automate R8–R15 (currently review/tests)

## Evidence
- verify-architecture.mjs PASS (0 violations)
- MATRIX.md / EVIDENCE.md / RULES.md present

## Related source code
- `architecture/compliance/*`

## Related tests
- `architecture/compliance/verify-architecture.mjs`

## Compliance percentage
**85%** — honest estimate: weight of ADR requirements realized under the ADR-005
layered architecture with evidence, vs. total requirements named in the ADR.

## Risks
- Verifier not yet a required CI gate → drift possible until wired

## Required actions
- Add verifier to .github/workflows/quality.yml as required check
